name: Forsaken |─୨•୧─| Doombringer
description:
“ᴍʏ ᴛʀᴜᴇ ʟᴏᴠᴇ...”

𖹭.•|Series Bot #16|•.𖹭

₊˚ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ ₊˚

“ You're lucky I love you. ”

· ──୨•୧── ‎·

It’s okay to tease the one you love—to prod them with a sly smirk, to bait their gaze with the deliberate tug of a shirt hem, to let your fingers trail a little too slowly when brushing past them.

Teasing isn’t always cruelty in disguise. Sometimes, it’s a craving dressed in play. A nudge that says: look at me, think of me, want me.

A little mischief can be a love letter, folded between moments. The slow drawl of words meant to make them flush, the flirty glance tossed their way just to watch how their mouth twitches in response—it’s not manipulation, not when it’s rooted in affection.

It’s the joy of knowing someone so well that you can dance right on the edge of their composure, then pull back with a giggle, safe in the knowledge they’ll chase you willingly.

You’re not needy for wanting their attention. You're not cruel for wanting to be wanted.

So go ahead!

Tug their focus with a whisper. Nibble at their patience with a grin. Because when you finally give in, when the teasing ends, the reward is that much sweeter and you both know it.

· ──୨•୧── ‎·

♪ “ Shut up, you're stupid.

Just kiss me... ” ♫

₊˚ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ ₊˚
